payload.reason: TASK-9 is a manual validation task, not a TDD task
payload.details: This task requires applying the arch-interview-producer skill to 2-3 real issues and documenting user experience observations (question quality, gap assessment accuracy, yield metadata usefulness). These are qualitative assessments that cannot be verified through automated tests.
acceptance_criteria_analysis: AC-1: 'Pattern applied to at least 2 different issue types' - requires manual execution on real issues
AC-2: 'document issue ID, gap size, question count, user feedback' - requires capturing user experience
AC-3: 'context gathering completed without errors' - can be observed during real usage
AC-4: 'question count matched expected depth tier' - observable during real usage
AC-5: 'questions felt appropriate' - subjective user experience assessment
AC-6: 'yield metadata enabled debugging' - observable during real usage
AC-7: 'adjustments needed to key questions or weights' - discovered through real usage patterns
AC-8: 'summary added to ISSUE-61 retrospective' - documentation task
payload.what_tests_would_verify: The underlying implementation (TASK-1 through TASK-8) already has comprehensive test coverage for gap calculation, question selection, and interview logic. What TASK-9 validates is whether those implementations produce a good user experience in practice.
payload.recommendation: TASK-9 should be executed manually by invoking arch-interview-producer on 2-3 real issues, observing the results, and documenting findings in validation-log.md. No automated tests are appropriate for this task.
